title: Department Manager Vacancy at Kalyan Jewellers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Kalyan Jewellers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Kalyan Jewellers in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!
